name: Deltek Vantagepoint AEC ERP API
what_it_does: Deltek Vantagepoint (successor to Deltek Vision) AEC project-based ERP REST API for project accounting, CRM, resource planning, and business intelligence for architecture, engineering, and consulting firms. Enables AI agents to manage project setup and WBS for automated project accounting initialization, handle opportunity and proposal management for AEC business development CRM automation, access project budget and fee management for profitability tracking automation, retrieve time and expense entry for project cost allocation and billing, manage project billing and invoice generation for professional services revenue recognition, handle resource planning and staff utilization for capacity management automation, access project performance analytics and KPIs for AEC firm business intelligence, retrieve multiplier and overhead rate calculation for DCAA-compliant indirect cost management, manage consultant and teaming partner management for joint venture billing, and integrate Vantagepoint with BIM platforms (Autodesk), Deltek Payments, and Microsoft 365.
use_cases: Tracking AEC project profitability from finance agents
Managing proposals from business development agents
Automating billing from professional services agents
Planning staff utilization from resource management agents
not_for: General construction contractors (use Procore or Trimble Viewpoint)
Law firm practice management (use Elite 3E or Clio)
best_when: An architecture, engineering, environmental, or consulting firm wanting AI agents to automate project accounting, business development CRM, resource utilization, billing, and government contract compliance within Deltek Vantagepoint as the AEC firm ERP system of record.
avoid_when: VISION-TO-VANTAGEPOINT MIGRATION API CHANGES: Many AEC firms still use Deltek Vision (predecessor); Vantagepoint REST API is different from Vision API; automated integrations built for Vision require rearchitecture for Vantagepoint; verify current deployment (Vision or Vantagepoint) before building automation. DCAA INDIRECT COST POOL ACCURACY FOR GOVERNMENT CONTRACTS: Automated overhead rate and indirect cost pool allocation from Vantagepoint used in DCAA billing rate submissions must be reconciled with actual incurred costs; automated provisional billing rates without annual incurred cost reconciliation creates DCAA questioned cost risk. PERCENT-COMPLETE BILLING REVIEW MANDATE: Automated professional services invoice generation from Vantagepoint percent-complete milestone data must be reviewed by project manager before client submission; automated billing without PM review creates fee dispute and E&O professional liability exposure. FAR UNALLOWABLE COST SEGREGATION: Automated cost entry to Vantagepoint for government contracts must segregate FAR 31.205 unallowable costs at time of entry; automated cost allocation without unallowable flagging creates DCAA audit findings and potential contract overbilling.

auth.notes: Deltek Vantagepoint uses OAuth 2.0 and API key authentication. REST API with JSON. Herndon, Virginia HQ (Deltek, Inc.). Deltek is a subsidiary of Roper Technologies (NASDAQ: ROP). Deltek acquired by New Mountain Capital PE 2012, then by Roper Technologies 2016. 30,000+ project-based businesses. Vantagepoint launched 2021 as successor to Deltek Vision (launched 1999). AEC target market: architecture, engineering, consulting. Competes with BST Global, Unanet, and Oracle Fusion for AEC professional services ERP.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — per-user annual subscription with implementation
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual SaaS subscription per user; on-premise perpetual license; professional services implementation required
pricing.notes: Herndon VA. Deltek, Roper Technologies NASDAQ:ROP subsidiary. Founded 1983. 30,000+ project-based firms. Vantagepoint launched 2021. Per-user annual subscription or on-premise perpetual.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; project financial and reporting API calls throttled

known_agent_gotchas: VISION VS VANTAGEPOINT API — VERIFY DEPLOYMENT: Many AEC firms still run Deltek Vision (predecessor to Vantagepoint); Vision REST API and Vantagepoint REST API have different endpoint structures and authentication; confirm customer deployment version before API integration; automated Vision integration requires rebuild for Vantagepoint migration

NO WEBHOOKS — BILLING AND PROJECT EVENTS REQUIRE POLLING: Vantagepoint does not support native webhooks for project milestone completion, invoice approval, or payment events; automated project accounting workflow requires scheduled polling with appropriate interval for billing cycle alignment

DCAA INDIRECT COST SEGREGATION AT ENTRY: Automated cost entry to Vantagepoint for government AEC projects must classify FAR 31.205 unallowable costs at time of entry; automated cost entries without unallowable code tagging create DCAA audit findings; implement unallowable cost review gate for all automated cost entries on government contracts

Provisional billing rate accuracy for DCAA — automated Vantagepoint overhead rate used in government cost-plus billing must be DCAA-approved provisional rate or final negotiated rate; automated billing using unapproved internal rate creates DCAA questioned cost and contract overbilling risk

Percent-complete milestone billing PM review — automated milestone billing creation from Vantagepoint project progress must be reviewed by project manager before invoice generation; professional services invoice for percent-complete milestones without PM certification creates E&O professional liability and client dispute

Multi-company and multi-currency consolidation complexity — Vantagepoint multi-company module for global AEC firms requires inter-company elimination and currency translation per ASC 830; automated consolidation reporting without accounting review of inter-company transactions produces incorrect consolidated financials
agent_readiness.security_notes: AEC professional services ERP. SOC2, ISO27001. OAuth2/API key. US/EU/AU. Project accounting, CRM, and government contract data.

security_score_components.security_notes: AEC professional services ERP. SOC2, ISO27001. OAuth2/API key. US/EU/AU. Project financial and government contract data.
